query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_teachers,
  COUNT(city) as teachers_with_city,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(city) as teachers_without_city
FROM teachers;

SELECT city, COUNT(*) as count
FROM teachers
WHERE city IS NOT NULL AND city != ''
GROUP BY city
ORDER BY count DESC;
